rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` at line 73 implicitly relies on the default simp set for `Set.mem_singleton_iff`, making the proof brittle; switching to `simp only` with explicit lemmas is a genuine, Mathlib-standard proof-quality improvement confirmed directly in the diff. Review 1 incorrectly claims no brittle patterns exist.
